{{Infobox artifact
| name = Syphren, the Whispering Death
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Syphren, the Whispering Death]] is an [[Awakened]] bronze weapon that [[Lucan]] named.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Syphren]]'s blade looks like a glass window looking into a netherworld and is filled with dozens of shining green hands.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Syphren's power]] was increased by two kills performed by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
